name: Broccoli Cauliflower Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup (14 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the cauliflower and broccoli until tender-crisp.
2. Combine the soups, mushrooms, cheese, and onion rings in a bowl.
3. Spray a 9 x 13 inch baking pan with cooking spray.
4. Place the cooked vegetables on the bottom of the pan.
5. Add the soup mixture over the vegetables.
6. Sprinkle the cheese and onion rings on top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
